name: Frozen Coconut Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Add tapioca to milk and cook in double boiler for 30 minutes or until tapioca is clear. Stir frequently and add 1/4 cup sugar during the last few minutes of cooking.
2. Press the hot mixture through a sieve and add to beaten egg yolks.
3. Chill.
4. Beat egg whites with salt until frothy.
5. Gradually add remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks are formed.
6. Fold into cold tapioca mixture.
7. Fold in whipped cream, lemon juice, vanilla, and coconut.
8. Freeze until firm. Top with toasted coconut.
